ogTitle: Kingscote vs Kingston On Murray: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kingscote and Kingston On Murray.
heading: Kingscote vs Kingston On Murray — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kingscote, South Australia and Kingston On Murray, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kingston On Murray has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Kingscote (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kingscote or Kingston On Murray safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kingscote has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Kingston On Murray scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kingscote scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Kingston On Murray scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kingscote or Kingston On Murray?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kingston On Murray has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
